summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Automate Accounts e-store modernization. All major features working correctly: bank transfer checkout flow, admin payment toggles, portal welcome personalization, payment method column in orders, hero copy, category tabs order, product cards without prices, and 5% fee pricing breakdown.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin authentication (10/10 tests passing)
Backend: Bank transfer checkout creates order with status 'awaiting_bank_transfer'
Backend: Bank transfer orders have $0 fee (fee: 0.0, total equals subtotal)
Backend: Admin customers endpoint with payment method fields
Backend: Admin payment method toggle updates (allow_bank_transfer, allow_card_payment)
Backend: Orders endpoint returns payment_method field
Backend: Pricing calculation returns 5% fee correctly
Backend: Products list and detail endpoints
Frontend: Store hero copy matches - 'One Partner, One Roadmap - We've Got Zoho Covered'
Frontend: Category tabs in correct order (Zoho Express Setup, Migrate to Zoho, Manages Services, Build & Automate, Accounting on Zoho, Audit & Optimize)
Frontend: Product cards do NOT show prices (only bullets and description)
Frontend: View Details button opens in new tab (target='_blank')
Frontend: Product detail page shows pricing breakdown with 5% fee (Subtotal, Processing fee 5%, Total)
Frontend: Portal page shows 'Welcome, {Name}' personalization
Frontend: Portal orders table has Payment column showing 'Bank Transfer' or 'Card'
Frontend: Orders with bank transfer status show 'Awaiting Bank Transfer' in amber color
Frontend: Admin panel shows customer table with Bank Transfer and Card Payment toggle columns
Frontend: Admin payment toggles are functional (toggle switches visible)
Frontend: Cart page shows Payment Method selection (Bank Transfer by default)
Frontend: Bank Transfer option shows 'No processing fee' message
Frontend: Cart shows $0.00 processing fee when Bank Transfer selected
Frontend: Bank transfer success page shows Order Created, order number, payment instructions, and next steps
context_for_next_testing_agent: All modernization features verified. Bank transfer creates orders with 'awaiting_bank_transfer' status and $0 fee. Admin can toggle bank_transfer and card_payment per customer. Category order and hero copy match requirements. Product cards intentionally hide prices - only shown on detail page with 5% fee breakdown.
mocked_api_notes: Bank transfer/GoCardless is MOCKED - creates order with awaiting_bank_transfer status without real payment integration
